title: La malquerida
writer: Jacinto Benavente, Emilio Fernández, Mauricio Magdaleno
actors: Dolores del Rio, Pedro Armendáriz, Columba Domínguez
plot: In the ranch of El Soto lives Raymunda (Dolores del Río) and her daughter, Acacia (Columba Domínguez). After she is widowed, Raymunda marries Esteban (Pedro Armendáriz). What Raymunda does not suspect is that a deep passion has ar...
